name: Chopped Chicken Livers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Wash and drain the chicken livers. Remove all fat and any discolored spots. If a liver has a green area, discard it as it will make the dish bitter.
3. Arrange the livers on a foil-lined baking sheet and bake for 30 minutes at 375°F.
4. While the livers are baking, saute the onions in schmaltz (chicken fat) until very brown.
5. Peel the eggs and chop them coarsely.
6. Add the chopped liver, sauteed onions, salt, and pepper to a food processor or blender.
7. Pulse the mixture until everything is finely ground and combined.
8. Serve as an appetizer on a bed of lettuce with chopped onion.
